tagline: Crafting cinematic stories, one frame at a time.
description: Video Editor and Content Creator with 3+ years of experience in short-form video, cinematic edits, and social media growth strategies.

roles.detailed: Video Editor | Content Creator | Social Media Strategist

bio: Results-driven Video Editor and Content Creator with 3+ years of experience in short-form video content, cinematic edits, and social media campaigns. Scaled an e-commerce brand from zero to profitable using 100% organic content. Reduced client turnaround time by 40% by integrating AI workflows. Delivered video production to 20+ regional businesses across Salem and Erode districts. Currently pursuing BCA with a focus on computer vision and machine learning.

bullets: Scaled an ornamental fish e-commerce brand from zero to profitable using 100% organic Instagram content — zero paid ads.
Grew Instagram followers from 0 to 400+ within 24 months through cinematic product videos, reels, and poster campaigns.
Created all in-house video & photo content using CapCut and Canva, maintaining 3–4 posts per week consistently.
Designed high-impact hook-driven content to drive consistent orders and repeat enquiries via Instagram DMs.
Managed full business operations including inventory, customer relations, order fulfilment, pricing, and digital storefront.
experience.desc: Built and scaled a profitable ornamental fish e-commerce brand on Instagram from scratch using organic cinematic content and strategic social media management.

bullets: Delivered product showcases, promotional reels, and event coverage for 20+ local shops and small businesses across Salem and Erode districts.
Integrated photorealistic AI image generation into editing workflows, reducing project turnaround time by 40%.
Wrote scripts, hook lines, and caption copy for Instagram Reels to maximize watch-time for client accounts.
Provided content calendars, brand identity guidance, and growth strategies to 10+ regional businesses, improving posting consistency.
Developed high-retention content strategies including scriptwriting, hooks, thumbnails, and Instagram analytics reporting.
experience.desc: Freelance video editing and content strategy for 20+ regional businesses, combining cinematic production with AI-powered workflows and data-driven Instagram growth.

projects.title: Rose Fish Farm
projects.subtitle: Organic E-commerce Brand
projects.desc: Built a profitable ornamental fish e-commerce brand from zero using 100% organic cinematic content on Instagram — growing from 0 to 400+ followers and consistent order volume within 24 months, with zero paid advertising spend.

projects.title: AI-Powered Editing Pipeline
projects.subtitle: 40% Faster Client Turnaround
projects.desc: Integrated photorealistic AI image generation (Midjourney, RunwayML) and computer vision tools (PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX) into standard post-production workflows, cutting client content turnaround time by 40% across 20+ freelance projects.

publications.desc: Bachelor of Computer Applications at The Kavery Arts & Science College, Mecheri, TN. Coursework: Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Data Structures & Algorithms, and C++.
